descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-3 in Centennial Cup playoff game, tying series 1-1.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes, British Columbia champions, beat the Saskatchewan champion Humboldt Broncos 5-3 in a Centennial Cup junior-A playoff game on April 22, 1987, in Humboldt, tying their best-of-seven tier-two western final series at 1-1. Jason Phillips scored three goals, with Stan Czenczek and Brian Kozak adding one each. Humboldt's goals came from Dave Shyiak, Kevin Luke, and Bill McDougall.
